hooks.command: cd /Users/osilkin/Programming/learning/llm-curriculum && if git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then exit 0; fi && git add -A && SUMMARY=$(git diff --cached --stat | tail -1 | sed 's/^ *//') && git commit -m "Auto-commit: ${SUMMARY}" && git push 2>&1 || true
